title: centaurea × vistensis
intro: Centaurea × vistensis, a hybrid of the Centaurea montana and Centaurea scabiosa, is a perennial plant species native to the Iberian Peninsula. It is a flowering plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health conditions due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. Centaurea × vistensis can be prepared as herbal tea, tincture, or infused oil, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various forms.
